name: Data Agent Creation and Configuration
description: Create a Data Agent, connect to a lakehouse, configure tables, add few-shots, test, and publish.

steps.command: fabio data-agent add-fewshot --workspace $WS_ID --id $AGENT_ID --datasource-name "SalesLH" --question "Top 5 customers by revenue?" --answer "SELECT TOP 5 ..."
fabio data-agent query --workspace $WS_ID --id $AGENT_ID --stage sandbox --question "How many orders last month?"

tips: Max 5 datasources per agent, 100 fewshots per datasource.
Use --stage production on query to test published version.
Use fabio data-agent upload-fewshots --file examples.csv for bulk loading.
Use fabio data-agent describe-element to add column descriptions.
